seoTitle: North Perth vs North Plantations — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Perth and North Plantations. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Perth vs North Plantations: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Perth and North Plantations.
heading: North Perth vs North Plantations — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Perth, Western Australia and North Plantations, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Plantations has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to North Perth (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Perth or North Plantations safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Perth has a flood risk score of 37/100, while North Plantations scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Perth scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. North Plantations scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Perth or North Plantations?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Plantations has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
